text:
1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: There will be a record for a beneficiary in this supplemental file if the beneficiary was covered under 
any type of waiver in any month in the calendar year. Specifically, this value is set to 1 if there is a non-
missing value for any of the monthly waiver ID variables (WVR_ID_##_01–WVR_ID_##_12) or monthly 
waiver type
